videos.video_name: Do not touch fire, stove, or hot things
Do not put small things in mouth or nose
Tell an adult if you see fire or smoke
Do not play with matches or candles
Hold an adult’s hand while walking outside
Stay away from kitchen while cooking is happening
Stop and look before crossing the road
Do not touch plugs, wires, or switches with wet hands
Festivals of India (Diwali, Holi, Eid, Christmas)
Stay away from broken electrical items
Never go near water alone (ocean, pool)
